photography_tips: 💡 Always shoot in RAW format for better editing flexibility and image quality.
📐 Use the rule of thirds to compose more balanced and interesting photos.
🌅 Golden hour (just after sunrise or before sunset) provides the best natural lighting for photos.
🔭 Try using a tripod for sharper images, especially in low light conditions.
🎯 Experiment with different angles and perspectives to make your photos unique.
⚡ Use leading lines to draw the viewer's eye through the photograph.
🎨 Learn to use manual mode for complete creative control over your images.
🌿 Frame your subject using natural elements like trees or archways.
services: 📸 We offer professional photography services including weddings, portraits, events, and commercial photography.
🖼️ Our services include photo editing, retouching, color correction, and image restoration.
🎓 We also offer photography workshops, one-on-one training, and mentorship programs.
🏢 Corporate photography, product photography, and real estate photography are also available.
💑 Specializing in wedding photography, engagement shoots, and pre-wedding sessions.
pricing: 💰 Our pricing starts from $200 for basic shoots. Contact us for a custom quote tailored to your needs!
📋 We have flexible packages to suit every budget. Let me know what you're looking for and I'll help!
